description: A resident is moving out of the city and needs to close their water utility account.

nodes.task_description: Identify the resident's utility account and their requested service stop date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the account and notes the move-out date.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a final meter reading for the service stop date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the final read.

nodes.task_description: Process the account closure and explain that a final bill will be mailed to their forwarding address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent closes the account and clearly explains the final billing process.
